en.text: or ; from H6887; compare as in H6864 narrow; (as a noun) a tight place (usually figuratively, i.e. trouble); also a pebble ; (transitive) an opponent (as crowding)

senses.gloss_en: or ; from H6887; compare as in H6864 narrow; (as a noun) a tight place (usually figuratively, i.e. trouble); also a pebble ; (transitive) an opponent (as crowding)
